title: 宝塚記念の後に・『つまんない』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky wins the Takarazuka Kinen. She now
has further confidence that exhaustive thinking
will lead her to victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sensing her rivals' intense stares from behind, she
worries they'll use this loss as further motivation
to improve their skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of this has become so played out, she
complains—or is something else on her mind?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She heeds King Halo's directive and decides to
run in the autumn Tenno Sho next. An uneasy
summer begins...
